mechanism: Three-phase sequencing: goods disinflation exhaustion in Phase 2 reveals services persistence as the dominant residual in Phase 3. Markets declare 'mission accomplished' during Phase 2 in 4/6 historical episodes, systematically underestimating Phase 3 difficulty.
regime_dependence: This sequencing is observed across all 6 historical episodes studied; the economy is currently transitioning from late Phase 2 to early Phase 3
